title: Digital Product Passport Envelope
description: Technology-neutral envelope for a Digital Product Passport. Captures the passport identity, subject reference, lifecycle state, access class, and predecessor/successor links. Does not contain regulation-specific field lists — those are added by packs/.

passportId.description: Globally unique passport identifier — typically a URN. Must be stable across lifecycle transitions.

passportVersion.description: Semver of this passport instance (increments on regulated data updates)

accessClasses.description: Access class definitions for this passport. Specializations may extend these generic classes with pack-specific policy overlays.

predecessorLinks.description: Links to original passports this passport was derived from (repurposing, remanufacturing)

successorLinks.description: Links to passports created from this one (successor after repurposing)

regulationPackIds.description: Pack IDs that contributed field requirements to this passport

issuedAt.description: ISO-8601 datetime when this passport was first issued
